description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored body with a predominantly dark gray exterior, accented by a striking, organic-looking brown structure that envelops its right arm and partially extends to its torso and leg. The robot's head is angular with two glowing teal eye-like elements, giving it a vigilant, sentient appearance. Its left arm and both legs are constructed from the same dark, metallic material as the torso, while the right arm appears to be composed of a twisted, root-like material, suggesting a hybrid of synthetic and organic design. The robot's build is athletic and humanoid, with defined musculature and jointed limbs, allowing for a wide range of motion. Subtle teal highlights are visible on the chest and right arm, possibly indicating embedded technology or power sources. The overall design suggests a fusion of advanced robotics and natural elements, making it visually distinct and imposing in an urban environment.
description: A humanoid robot with a dark armored body, glowing teal eyes, and a twisted, organic brown right arm, blending synthetic and natural aesthetics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's angular head, glowing teal eyes, armored torso, and the prominent brown, root-like right arm.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the organic brown right arm and its integration into the torso and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor plating and the brown structure wrapping around the right side, with both legs and the left arm fully visible.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the armored left side and the profile of the head, with the brown structure mostly hidden.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both legs straight, left arm relaxed at the side, and right arm slightly bent and extended forward. Head is facing forward, torso is upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; exterior consists of integrated armored panels and a root-like organic covering on the right arm and part of the torso.
attribute_facial_features: The face is angular with two prominent glowing teal eye elements, no visible mouth or nose, and a helmet-like structure covering the head.
attribute_limb_articulation: Visible articulation at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; joints appear to be a mix of hinge and ball types, allowing for flexible movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two teal eye-like elements on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors are visible.
